mapper.sql: record_id, patient_id, patient_name, patient_gender, patient_age, patient_phone, patient_birthday, patient_blood_type, doctor_id, doctor_name, visit_time, chief_complaint, present_illness, past_history, allergy_history, physical_exam, diagnosis, treatment, prescription, attachments, follow_up, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_medical_record( patient_id, patient_name, patient_gender, patient_age, patient_phone, patient_birthday, patient_blood_type, doctor_id, doctor_name, visit_time, chief_complaint, present_illness, past_history, allergy_history, physical_exam, diagnosis, treatment, prescription, attachments, follow_up, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{patientGender}, #{patientAge}, #{patientPhone}, #{patientBirthday}, #{patientBloodType}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{visitTime}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{presentIllness}, #{pastHistory}, #{allergyHistory}, #{physicalExam}, #{diagnosis}, #{treatment}, #{prescription}, #{attachments}, #{followUp}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )
